channel.title: What is the status of the "sitemaps" feature?
channel.description:
In this article
https://frontity.org/blog/seo-for-headless-wordpress-themes/#javascript-and-server-side-rendering
We can read
> * Frontity: we want to make use of the WordPress sitemap plugins. There is actually a conversation going on about including the sitemaps in the WordPress core, so we will release a package for sitemaps taking into account all these scenarios.
Where can I find that conversation? What is the status of this feature? Is there a Feature Discussion created for this?

item.title: What is the status of the "sitemaps" feature?
item.dc:creator: javierlorente.es
item.description:
In case it helps you, I have the back at https://frontity.javierlorente.es/wp-sitemap.xml and the front https://www.javierlorente.es/wp-sitemap.xml (404)

Read full topic
item.source: What is the status of the "sitemaps" feature?

item.title: What is the status of the "sitemaps" feature?
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Where can I find that conversation?

Hey @juanma, you can find more information here: XML Sitemaps landing in WordPress Core.

Read full topic
item.source: What is the status of the "sitemaps" feature?

item.title: What is the status of the "sitemaps" feature?
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
In this article

Frontity – 9 Sep 19

SEO for Headless WordPress Themes

A practical guide on SEO for Headless WordPress Themes: what challenges you need to consider and how to solve them to keep your SEO up.

We can read

  • Frontity: we want to make use of the WordPress sitemap plugins. There is actually a conversation going on about including the sitemaps in the WordPress core, so we will release a package for sitemaps taking into account all these scenarios.

Where can I find that conversation? What is the status of this feature? Is there a Feature Discussion created for this?

Read full topic
item.source: What is the status of the "sitemaps" feature?
